languages.text: "Поглядим, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана. Убивать я тебя не хочу, но и драться вполсилы не намерен".
languages.translation_comment:
Если играют этюды DW_CombatTechnique, DW_VenomResistance и DW_IzhdrigWeakness
Затемнение, переходим к BatoshskiTrainingOperation_dialogue

Если играют этюды DW_CombatTechnique, DW_VenomResistance и DW_IzhdrigWeakness
Затемнение, переходим к BatoshskiTrainingOperation_dialogue

languages.text: "We'll see about that, heir of Seberian. I don't want you dead, but I'm not going to hold back."
languages.original_text: "Поглядим, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана. Убивать я тебя не хочу, но и драться вполсилы не намерен".

traits.locale_text: "We'll see about that, heir of Seberian. I don't want you dead, but I'm not going to hold back."
"We'll see about that, heir of Seberian. I don't want you dead, but I'm not going to hold back."
"I have no objection, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'm sure you would have taken quite a few of my people with you otherwise."
"We'll see about that, heir of Seberian. I don't want you dead, but I'm not going to hold back."
"We'll see about that, heir of Seberian. I don't want you dead, but I'm not going to hold back."

languages.text: 「私は異議ありません、御{mf|殿|殿}様。そうでなければ、御{mf|殿|殿}様は私の部下を相当数連れていかれたでしょう」
languages.original_text: "I have no objection, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'm sure you would have taken quite a few of my people with you otherwise."

languages.text: "Göreceğiz Seberian'ın vârisi. Ölmenizi istemiyorum ama kendimi de tutmayacağım."
languages.original_text: "We'll see about that, heir of Seberian. I don't want you dead, but I'm not going to hold back."

traits.locale_text: "Göreceğiz Seberian'ın vârisi. Ölmenizi istemiyorum ama kendimi de tutmayacağım."

languages.text: “那就走着瞧吧，塞贝里安的继承人。我不想杀您，可我也绝不会手下留情。”
languages.original_text: "We'll see about that, heir of Seberian. I don't want you dead, but I'm not going to hold back."

traits.locale_text: “那就走着瞧吧，塞贝里安的继承人。我不想杀您，可我也绝不会手下留情。”

languages.text: "Das werden wir ja sehen, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} von Seberian. Ich will Euren Tod nicht, werde mich aber nicht zurückhalten."
languages.original_text: "We'll see about that, heir of Seberian. I don't want you dead, but I'm not going to hold back."

traits.locale_text: "Das werden wir ja sehen, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} von Seberian. Ich will Euren Tod nicht, werde mich aber nicht zurückhalten."

languages.text: « C'est ce que nous allons voir, {mf|héritier|héritière} de Seberian. Je ne souhaite pas votre mort, mais je ne vous ferai pas de cadeau. »
languages.original_text: "We'll see about that, heir of Seberian. I don't want you dead, but I'm not going to hold back."

traits.locale_text: « C'est ce que nous allons voir, {mf|héritier|héritière} de Seberian. Je ne souhaite pas votre mort, mais je ne vous ferai pas de cadeau. »

languages.text: «Ya lo veremos, hereder{mf|o|a} de Seberian. No quiero verl{mf|e|a} morir, pero no pienso contenerme».
languages.original_text: "We'll see about that, heir of Seberian. I don't want you dead, but I'm not going to hold back."

traits.locale_text: «Ya lo veremos, hereder{mf|o|a} de Seberian. No quiero verl{mf|e|a} morir, pero no pienso contenerme».
